title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API and Docker support.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node.js and browsers; same capabilities as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration enabling Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding providers inside LangChain pipelines.

title: Ollama Web UI (ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama resembling ChatGPT UI; supports multi-user, RAG, and plugins.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack component that wraps Ollama models for generative and embedding tasks in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot (vscode extension)
summary: Neovim plugin that adds Ollama-powered code completion and inline chat using a Copilot-like interface.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Kotlin extensions.

title: Ollama Sharp
summary: .NET wrapper for Ollama’s REST API supporting chat, completion, embeddings, and model operations.

title: Ollama Copilot (VS Code)
summary: VS Code extension that brings Ollama models into the editor for inline code generation and explanation.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store and Streamlit frontend.

title: Ollama Discord Bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that streams Ollama responses in chat threads with slash commands and mod roles.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat tool written in Go that supports multi-line prompts and conversation history.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to Ollama’s REST API with serde models.

title: Ollama Telegram Bot
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot that chats with any Ollama model and supports group mentions and inline queries.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for common Ollama use-cases: PDF chat, function calling, voice, and edge deployment.

title: ollama-npm (unofficial)
summary: Lightweight npm wrapper around the Ollama REST API with TypeScript definitions and Promise-based interface.

title: ollama-py (PyPI mirror)
summary: Official PyPI distribution of the ollama-python client maintained by the Ollama team.
